 (
 select MESSAGE_3B18_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_X_DV_3B18_SHPMNT_HDRS
 minus
 select MESSAGE_3B18_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_X_DV_3B18_SHPMNT_HDRS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.MESSAGE_3B18_ID = STG_CG1_X_DV_3B18_SHPMNT_HDRS.MESSAGE_3B18_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_X_DV_3B18_SHPMNT_HDRS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:

SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B18_SHPMNT_HDRS)
